questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在单个可用区中运行的 Amazon EC2 实例上托管应用程序。该应用程序可通过使用开放系统互连 (OSI) 模型的传输层进行访问。公司需要应用架构具有高可用性。哪种步骤组合能够最经济有效地满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company hosts an application on Amazon EC2 instances that run in a single Availability Zone. The application is accessible by using the transport layer of the Open Systems Interconnection (OSI) model. The company needs the application architecture to have high availability. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在不同的可用区中配置新的 EC2 实例。使用 Amazon Route 53 将流量路由到所有实例。
A.en: Configure new EC2 instances in a different Availability Zone. Use Amazon Route 53 to route traffic to all instances.

B.zh: 在 EC2 实例前面配置网络负载均衡器。
B.en: Configure a Network Load Balancer in front of the EC2 instances.

C.zh: 为实例的 TCP 流量配置网络负载均衡器。为实例的 HTTP 和 HTTPS 流量配置应用程序负载均衡器。
C.en: Configure a Network Load Balancer for TCP traffic to the instances. Configure an Application Load Balancer for HTTP and HTTPS traffic to the instances.

D.zh: 为 EC2 实例创建 Auto Scaling 组。配置 Auto Scaling 组以使用多个可用区。配置 Auto Scaling 组以对实例运行应用程序运行状况检查。
D.en: Create an Auto Scaling group for the EC2 instances. Configure the Auto Scaling group to use multiple Availability Zones. Configure the Auto Scaling group to run application health checks on the instances.

E.zh: 创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报。配置警报以重新启动转换为停止状态的 EC2 实例。
E.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm. Configure the alarm to restart EC2 instances that transition to a stopped state.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：缺乏负载均衡器，无法动态分配流量，也没有提及运行状况检查机制。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: There is a lack of load balancer, no way to dynamically distribute traffic, and no mention of a health check mechanism.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：配置网络负载均衡器： 分析：网络负载均衡器可以在传输层（OSI 模型的第 4 层）分发流量，支持 TCP 流量，具有高性能、低延迟的特点。原因：这是实现高可用性的重要组件之一。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Configuring the Network Load Balancer: Correctness: The Network Load Balancer can distribute traffic at the transport layer (Layer 4 of the OSI model), supports TCP traffic, and has high performance and low latency. Reason: This is one of the important components for achieving high availability.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该问题没有明确要求区分 TCP 和 HTTP/HTTPS 流量。使用负载均衡器就足够了。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The question does not explicitly ask to differentiate between TCP and HTTP/HTTPS traffic. Using a load balancer will suffice.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：创建Auto Scaling组并配置多个可用区： 分析： Auto Scaling组可以动态调整实例数量，支持跨多个可用区部署，保证高可用性。原因：这是实现高可用性和弹性的重要组成部分之一。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Create an Auto Scaling group and configure multiple availability zones: Correctness: Auto Scaling groups can dynamically adjust the number of instances and support deployment across multiple availability zones to ensure high availability. Why: This is one of the important components of achieving high availability and resiliency.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项仅解决实例故障，不会启用跨可用区的高可用性架构。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option only resolves instance failures and does not enable a high-availability architecture across Availability Zones.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 EC2 实例前面配置网络负载均衡器。；D. 为 EC2 实例创建 Auto Scaling 组。配置 Auto Scaling 组以使用多个可用区。配置 Auto Scaling 组以对实例运行应用程序运行状况检查。
answer_text.en: B. Configure a Network Load Balancer in front of the EC2 instances.; D. Create an Auto Scaling group for the EC2 instances. Configure the Auto Scaling group to use multiple Availability Zones. Configure the Auto Scaling group to run application health checks on the instances.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： BD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：配置网络负载均衡器： 分析：网络负载均衡器可以在传输层（OSI 模型的第 4 层）分发流量，支持 TCP 流量，具有高性能、低延迟的特点。原因：这是实现高可用性的重要组件之一。；创建Auto Scaling组并配置多个可用区： 分析： Auto Scaling组可以动态调整实例数量，支持跨多个可用区部署，保证高可用性。原因：这是实现高可用性和弹性的重要组成部分之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Configuring the Network Load Balancer: Correctness: The Network Load Balancer can distribute traffic at the transport layer (Layer 4 of the OSI model), supports TCP traffic, and has high performance and low latency. Reason: This is one of the important components for achieving high availability.; Create an Auto Scaling group and configure multiple availability zones: Correctness: Auto Scaling groups can dynamically adjust the number of instances and support deployment across multiple availability zones to ensure high availability. Why: This is one of the important components of achieving high availability and resiliency.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon S3 托管其静态网站。该公司希望在网页上添加联系表单。联系表单将具有动态服务器端组件，供用户输入姓名、电子邮件地址、电话号码和用户消息。该公司预计每月的现场访问量将少于 100 次。当客户填写联系表格时，必须通过电子邮件通知公司。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company uses Amazon S3 to host its static website. The company wants to add a contact form to the webpage. The contact form will have dynamic server-side components for users to input their name, email address, phone number, and user message. The company expects fewer than 100 site visits each month. The contact form must notify the company by email when a customer fills out the form. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 中托管动态联系表单。设置 Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) 以连接到第三方电子邮件提供商。
A.en: Host the dynamic contact form in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Set up Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to connect to a third-party email provider.

B.zh: 创建一个 Amazon API Gateway 终端节点，该终端节点从 AWS Lambda 函数返回联系表单。在 API Gateway 上配置另一个 Lambda 函数以将消息发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。
B.en: Create an Amazon API Gateway endpoint that returns the contact form from an AWS Lambda function. Configure another Lambda function on the API Gateway to publish a message to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Amplify Hosting 托管静态内容和动态内容的网站。使用服务器端脚本来构建联系表单。配置 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 以将消息传送到公司。
C.en: Host the website by using AWS Amplify Hosting for static content and dynamic content. Use server-side scripting to build the contact form. Configure Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to deliver the message to the company.

D.zh: 将网站从 Amazon S3 迁移到运行 Windows Server 的 Amazon EC2 实例。使用适用于 Windows Server 的 互联网 信息服务 (IIS) 来托管网页。使用客户端脚本来构建联系表单。将表单与 Amazon WorkMail 集成。
D.en: Migrate the website from Amazon S3 to Amazon EC2 instances that run Windows Server. Use Internet Information Services (IIS) for Windows Server to host the webpage. Use client-side scripting to build the contact form. Integrate the form with Amazon WorkMail.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： Amazon ECS 是适合运行复杂冷应用的服务器服务，但在月访问量低于 100 次的场景中部署成本昂贵且复杂。使用 Amazon SES 连接到第三方电子提供商会增加额外的配置复杂性。此选项不满足“最具成本效益”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Amazon ECS is a server service suitable for running complex cold applications, but it is expensive and complex to deploy in scenarios with less than 100 monthly visits. Using Amazon SES to connect to third-party electronics providers adds additional configuration complexity. This option does not meet the "most cost effective" requirement.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析： Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 都是无服务器架构，适合小流量场景，成本低。使用 Lambda 函数处理表单提交并连接到 Amazon SNS 以满足动态通信和通信需求。该选项实施起来简单且具有成本效益。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda are both serverless architectures, suitable for low-traffic scenarios and low cost. Use Lambda functions to handle form submissions and connect to Amazon SNS for dynamic communication and communication needs. This option is simple and cost-effective to implement.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： AWS Amplify Hosting 可与托管和动态服务器配合使用，但在每月访问量少于 100 次的场景中可能会更昂贵。使用Amazon SQS传输消息增加了复杂性，并不能直接满足“大智公司”的需求。此选项不满足“最具成本效益”的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: AWS Amplify Hosting works with hosted and dynamic servers, but can be more expensive in scenarios with less than 100 visits per month. Using Amazon SQS to transmit messages adds complexity and does not directly meet the needs of "Dazhi Company". This option does not meet the "most cost effective" requirement.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：将网站迁移到 Amazon EC2 实例会增加管理复杂性和成本。使用Windows Server和IIS比较复杂，不适合低流量场景。此选项不满足“最具成本效益”的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Migrating a website to an Amazon EC2 instance increases management complexity and cost. Using Windows Server and IIS is complicated and not suitable for low-traffic scenarios. This option does not meet the "most cost effective" requirement.

answer_text.zh: B. 创建一个 Amazon API Gateway 终端节点，该终端节点从 AWS Lambda 函数返回联系表单。在 API Gateway 上配置另一个 Lambda 函数以将消息发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。
answer_text.en: B. Create an Amazon API Gateway endpoint that returns the contact form from an AWS Lambda function. Configure another Lambda function on the API Gateway to publish a message to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析： Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 都是无服务器架构，适合小流量场景，成本低。使用 Lambda 函数处理表单提交并连接到 Amazon SNS 以满足动态通信和通信需求。该选项实施起来简单且具有成本效益。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda are both serverless architectures, suitable for low-traffic scenarios and low cost. Use Lambda functions to handle form submissions and connect to Amazon SNS for dynamic communication and communication needs. This option is simple and cost-effective to implement.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中为其业务部门创建专用 AWS 账户。最近，一条重要通知被发送到业务部门账户的根用户电子邮件地址，而不是发送到指定的账户所有者。该公司希望确保未来所有通知都可以根据计费、操作或安全的通知类别发送给不同的员工。哪种解决方案将最安全地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company creates dedicated AWS accounts in AWS Organizations for its business units. Recently, an important notification was sent to the root user email address of a business unit account instead of the assigned account owner. The company wants to ensure that all future notifications can be sent to different employees based on the notification categories of billing, operations, or security. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST securely?

A.zh: 将每个 AWS 账户配置为使用公司管理的单个电子邮件地址。确保所有账户所有者都可以访问电子邮件账户以接收通知。为每个 AWS 账户配置备用联系人，并为每个业务部门的计费团队、安全团队和运营团队配置相应的通讯组列表。
A.en: Configure each AWS account to use a single email address that the company manages. Ensure that all account owners can access the email account to receive notifications. Configure alternate contacts for each AWS account with corresponding distribution lists for the billing team, the security team, and the operations team for each business unit.

B.zh: 将每个 AWS 账户配置为对公司管理的每个业务部门使用不同的电子邮件分发列表。使用可以响应警报的管理员电子邮件地址配置每个通讯组列表。为每个 AWS 账户配置备用联系人，并为每个业务部门的计费团队、安全团队和运营团队配置相应的通讯组列表。
B.en: Configure each AWS account to use a different email distribution list for each business unit that the company manages. Configure each distribution list with administrator email addresses that can respond to alerts. Configure alternate contacts for each AWS account with corresponding distribution lists for the billing team, the security team, and the operations team for each business unit.

C.zh: 将每个 AWS 账户根用户电子邮件地址配置为每个业务部门的一个人的单独公司管理的电子邮件地址。为每个 AWS 账户配置备用联系人，并为每个业务部门的计费团队、安全团队和运营团队配置相应的通讯组列表。
C.en: Configure each AWS account root user email address to be the individual company managed email address of one person from each business unit. Configure alternate contacts for each AWS account with corresponding distribution lists for the billing team, the security team, and the operations team for each business unit.

D.zh: 配置每个 AWS 账户根用户以使用发送到集中邮箱的电子邮件别名。通过使用每个计费团队、安全团队和运营团队的单个业务管理电子邮件通讯组列表，为每个账户配置备用联系人。
D.en: Configure each AWS account root user to use email aliases that go to a centralized mailbox. Configure alternate contacts for each account by using a single business managed email distribution list each for the billing team, the security team, and the operations team.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全措施不充分，未能满足感染通知需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Safety measures were inadequate and failed to meet infection notification needs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：无法集中管理根用户电子邮件地址可能会使管理变得复杂。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The inability to centrally manage root user email addresses can complicate management.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全性不足，无法集中管理根用户电子邮件地址。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Insufficient security to centrally manage root user email addresses.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：集中管理根用户电子邮件地址，以提供分发需求的充分通知并确保高安全性。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Centrally manage root user email addresses to provide adequate notification of distribution needs and ensure high security.

answer_text.zh: D. 配置每个 AWS 账户根用户以使用发送到集中邮箱的电子邮件别名。通过使用每个计费团队、安全团队和运营团队的单个业务管理电子邮件通讯组列表，为每个账户配置备用联系人。
answer_text.en: D. Configure each AWS account root user to use email aliases that go to a centralized mailbox. Configure alternate contacts for each account by using a single business managed email distribution list each for the billing team, the security team, and the operations team.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (59%) A (28%) 10%。热门讨论与考点摘要：集中管理根用户电子邮件地址，以提供分发需求的充分通知并确保高安全性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (59%) A (28%) 10%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Centrally manage root user email addresses to provide adequate notification of distribution needs and ensure high security.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上运行电子商务应用程序。 Amazon EC2 实例处理购买并将购买详细信息存储在 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 数据库集群中。客户在使用高峰期间会遇到应用程序超时的情况。解决方案架构师需要重新构建应用程序，以便应用程序可以扩展以满足高峰使用需求。哪种行动组合能够最经济有效地满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company runs an ecommerce application on AWS. Amazon EC2 instances process purchases and store the purchase details in an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. Customers are experiencing application timeouts during times of peak usage. A solutions architect needs to rearchitect the application so that the application can scale to meet peak usage demands. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 配置新 EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling 组以重试购买，直到处理完成。更新应用程序以使用 Amazon RDS 代理连接到数据库集群。
A.en: Configure an Auto Scaling group of new EC2 instances to retry the purchases until the processing is complete. Update the applications to connect to the DB cluster by using Amazon RDS Proxy.

B.zh: 配置应用程序以在 Aurora PostgreSQL 数据库集群前面使用 Amazon ElastiCache 集群。
B.en: Configure the application to use an Amazon ElastiCache cluster in front of the Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster.

C.zh: 更新应用程序以将购买请求发送到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。配置从 SQS 队列读取的新 EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling 组。
C.en: Update the application to send the purchase requests to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure an Auto Scaling group of new EC2 instances that read from the SQS queue.

D.zh: 配置 AWS Lambda 函数以重试门票购买，直到处理完成。
D.en: Configure an AWS Lambda function to retry the ticket purchases until the processing is complete.

E.zh: 配置亚马逊 AP！带有使用计划的网关 REST API。
E.en: Configure an Amazon AP! Gateway REST API with a usage plan.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：该解决方案满足问题中的关键功能和非功能需求，并且与相关AWS服务的设计意图和最佳实践一致。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The solution meets the key functional and non-functional requirements in the problem and is consistent with the design intent and best practices of the relevant AWS service.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家使用 AWS Organizations 的公司在 30 个不同的 AWS 账户中运行 150 个应用程序。该公司使用 AWS 成本和使用情况报告在管理账户中创建新报告。该报告将传送到 Amazon S3 存储桶，该存储桶会复制到数据收集账户中的存储桶。该公司的高级领导层希望查看一个自定义仪表板，该仪表板提供从本月初开始每天的 NAT 网关成本。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company that uses AWS Organizations runs 150 applications across 30 different AWS accounts. The company used AWS Cost and Usage Report to create a new report in the management account. The report is delivered to an Amazon S3 bucket that is replicated to a bucket in the data collection account. The company’s senior leadership wants to view a custom dashboard that provides NAT gateway costs each day starting at the beginning of the current month. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 共享包含请求的表格视觉对象的 Amazon QuickSight 控制面板。配置 QuickSight 以使用 AWS DataSync 查询新报告。
A.en: Share an Amazon QuickSight dashboard that includes the requested table visual. Configure QuickSight to use AWS DataSync to query the new report.

B.zh: 共享包含请求的表格视觉对象的 Amazon QuickSight 控制面板。配置 QuickSight 以使用 Amazon Athena 查询新报告。
B.en: Share an Amazon QuickSight dashboard that includes the requested table visual. Configure QuickSight to use Amazon Athena to query the new report.

C.zh: 共享包含请求的表格视觉对象的 Amazon CloudWatch 控制面板。配置 CloudWatch 以使用 AWS DataSync 查询新报告。
C.en: Share an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that includes the requested table visual. Configure CloudWatch to use AWS DataSync to query the new report.

D.zh: 共享包含请求的表格视觉对象的 Amazon CloudWatch 控制面板。配置 CloudWatch 以使用 Amazon Athena 查询新报告。
D.en: Share an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that includes the requested table visual. Configure CloudWatch to use Amazon Athena to query the new report.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS DataSync 主要用于数据迁移和同步，而不是查询数据。 QuickSight 无法直接使用 DataSync 来查询成本和使用情况报告。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DataSync is primarily used for data migration and synchronization, not querying data. QuickSight cannot use DataSync directly to query cost and usage reports.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon Athena 可以直接查询存储在 S3 中的成本和使用情况报告。 QuickSight 可以使用 Athena 作为数据源创建可视化仪表板。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Athena can directly query cost and usage reports stored in S3. QuickSight can create visual dashboards using Athena as a data source.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： CloudWatch主要用于监控和日志分析，不适合查询成本和使用情况报告。此外， DataSync 不支持查询功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudWatch is mainly used for monitoring and log analysis, and is not suitable for querying cost and usage reports. Additionally, DataSync does not support query functionality.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： CloudWatch 不支持通过 Athena 查询数据。 CloudWatch的主要功能是监控和报警，而不是数据可视化和查询。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudWatch does not support querying data through Athena. CloudWatch's main function is monitoring and alarming, not data visualization and querying.

answer_text.zh: B. 共享包含请求的表格视觉对象的 Amazon QuickSight 控制面板。配置 QuickSight 以使用 Amazon Athena 查询新报告。
answer_text.en: B. Share an Amazon QuickSight dashboard that includes the requested table visual. Configure QuickSight to use Amazon Athena to query the new report.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon Athena 可以直接查询存储在 S3 中的成本和使用情况报告。 QuickSight 可以使用 Athena 作为数据源创建可视化仪表板。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Athena can directly query cost and usage reports stored in S3. QuickSight can create visual dashboards using Athena as a data source.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon S3 上托管一个高流量静态网站，其 Amazon CloudFront 分配的默认 TTL 为 0 秒。该公司希望实施缓存来提高网站的性能。然而，该公司还希望确保陈旧内容在部署后不会持续超过几分钟。解决方案架构师应该实施哪种缓存方法组合来满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company is hosting a high-traffic static website on Amazon S3 with an Amazon CloudFront distribution that has a default TTL of 0 seconds. The company wants to implement caching to improve performance for the website. However, the company also wants to ensure that stale content is not served for more than a few minutes after a deployment. Which combination of caching methods should a solutions architect implement to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 将 CloudFront 默认 TTL 设置为 2 分钟。
A.en: Set the CloudFront default TTL to 2 minutes.

B.zh: 在 S3 存储桶上将默认 TTL 设置为 2 分钟。
B.en: Set a default TTL of 2 minutes on the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 将 Cache-Control 私有指令添加到 Amazon S3 中的对象。
C.en: Add a Cache-Control private directive to the objects in Amazon S3.

D.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda@Edge 函数以将 Expires 标头添加到 HTTP 响应。配置函数以根据查看器响应运行。
D.en: Create an AWS Lambda@Edge function to add an Expires header to HTTP responses. Configure the function to run on viewer response.

E.zh: 向 Amazon S3 中的对象添加 24 小时的 Cache-Control max-age 指令。部署时，创建 CloudFront 失效以从边缘缓存中清除任何更改的文件。
E.en: Add a Cache-Control max-age directive of 24 hours to the objects in Amazon S3. On deployment, create a CloudFront invalidation to clear any changed files from edge caches.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：将 CloudFront 的默认 TTL 设置为 2 分钟可确保内容在边缘站点缓存一段时间，从而提高性能。同时，设置较短的TTL（2分钟）可以减少陈旧内容的时间，满足问题的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Setting CloudFront's default TTL to 2 minutes ensures content is cached at edge locations for a period of time, improving performance. At the same time, setting a shorter TTL (2 minutes) can reduce the time for stale content and meet the requirements of the problem.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3本身不支持直接设置TTL。 TTL 是 CloudFront 的一项功能，而不是 S3 的一项功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 itself does not support setting TTL directly. TTL is a feature of CloudFront, not S3.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Cache-Control private指令告诉缓存服务器不要缓存内容，这与“实施缓存以提高性能”的问题要求相矛盾。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Cache-Control private directive tells the cache server not to cache the content, which contradicts the question requirement of "implement caching to improve performance".

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然可以通过 Lambda@Edge 添加 Expires 标头，但这会增加复杂性，并且问题并不明确要求使用 Lambda@Edge。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While it is possible to add the Expires header via Lambda@Edge, this adds complexity and the question does not explicitly require the use of Lambda@Edge.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因： Cache-Control max-age 指令可以通过将对象缓存时间设置为 24 小时来提高性能。 CloudFront 失效允许在部署时清除更改的文件，确保过时的内容不会长时间缓存。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Cache-Control max-age directive can improve performance by setting the object cache time to 24 hours. CloudFront invalidation allows changed files to be purged upon deployment, ensuring that stale content is not cached for long periods of time.

answer_text.zh: A. 将 CloudFront 默认 TTL 设置为 2 分钟。；E. 向 Amazon S3 中的对象添加 24 小时的 Cache-Control max-age 指令。部署时，创建 CloudFront 失效以从边缘缓存中清除任何更改的文件。
answer_text.en: A. Set the CloudFront default TTL to 2 minutes.; E. Add a Cache-Control max-age directive of 24 hours to the objects in Amazon S3. On deployment, create a CloudFront invalidation to clear any changed files from edge caches.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： AE (54%) AC (41%) 2%。热门讨论与考点摘要：将 CloudFront 的默认 TTL 设置为 2 分钟可确保内容在边缘站点缓存一段时间，从而提高性能。同时，设置较短的TTL（2分钟）可以减少陈旧内容的时间，满足问题的要求。； Cache-Control max-age 指令可以通过将对象缓存时间设置为 24 小时来提高性能。 CloudFront 失效允许在部署时清除更改的文件，确保过时的内容不会长时间缓存。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (54%) AC (41%) 2%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Setting CloudFront's default TTL to 2 minutes ensures content is cached at edge locations for a period of time, improving performance. At the same time, setting a shorter TTL (2 minutes) can reduce the time for stale content and meet the requirements of the problem.; The Cache-Control max-age directive can improve performance by setting the object cache time to 24 hours. CloudFront invalidation allows changed files to be purged upon deployment, ensuring that stale content is not cached for long periods of time.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon EC2 实例和 AWS Lambda 函数运行其应用程序。 EC2 实例在 VPC 的私有子网中运行。 Lambda 函数需要直接网络访问 EC2 实例才能使应用程序正常运行。该应用程序将运行 1 年。应用程序使用的 Lambda 函数数量将在 1 年内增加。公司必须最大限度地降低所有应用程序资源的成本。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs its application by using Amazon EC2 instances and AWS Lambda functions. The EC2 instances run in private subnets of a VPC. The Lambda functions need direct network access to the EC2 instances for the application to work. The application will run for 1 year. The number of Lambda functions that the application uses will increase during the 1-year period. The company must minimize costs on all application resources. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 购买 EC2 实例节省计划。将 Lambda 函数连接到包含 EC2 实例的私有子网。
A.en: Purchase an EC2 Instance Savings Plan. Connect the Lambda functions to the private subnets that contain the EC2 instances.

B.zh: 购买 EC2 实例节省计划。将 Lambda 函数连接到运行 EC2 实例的同一 VPC 中的新公有子网。
B.en: Purchase an EC2 Instance Savings Plan. Connect the Lambda functions to new public subnets in the same VPC where the EC2 instances run.

C.zh: 购买计算节省计划。将 Lambda 函数连接到包含 EC2 实例的私有子网。
C.en: Purchase a Compute Savings Plan. Connect the Lambda functions to the private subnets that contain the EC2 instances.

D.zh: 购买计算节省计划。将 Lambda 函数保留在 Lambda 服务 VPC 中。
D.en: Purchase a Compute Savings Plan. Keep the Lambda functions in the Lambda service VPC.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：这个问题需要优化所有资源的成本，而EC2实例节省计划无法覆盖Lambda函数的成本。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This problem requires optimizing the cost of all resources, and the EC2 Instance Savings Plan cannot cover the cost of the Lambda function.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：公共子网不符合最佳实践，并且 Savings Plan 选择不适合 Lambda 函数。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Public subnets do not comply with best practices and Savings Plan selections are not suitable for Lambda functions.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：将 Lambda 函数连接到私有子网以满足安全要求，计算节省计划涵盖所有资源的成本优化需求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Connect Lambda functions to private subnets to meet security requirements, and compute savings plans cover cost optimization needs for all resources.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：问题明确要求Lambda函数需要直接网络访问EC2实例，而这个选项无法满足这个要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The question clearly requires that the Lambda function requires direct network access to the EC2 instance, and this option cannot meet this requirement.

answer_text.zh: C. 购买计算节省计划。将 Lambda 函数连接到包含 EC2 实例的私有子网。
answer_text.en: C. Purchase a Compute Savings Plan. Connect the Lambda functions to the private subnets that contain the EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (80%) 13% 7%。热门讨论与考点摘要：将 Lambda 函数连接到私有子网以满足安全要求，计算节省计划涵盖所有资源的成本优化需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (80%) 13% 7%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Connect Lambda functions to private subnets to meet security requirements, and compute savings plans cover cost optimization needs for all resources.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Control Tower 在 AWS 上部署了多账户策略。该公司为其每位开发人员提供了单独的 AWS 账户。该公司希望实施控制措施来限制开发人员产生的 AWS 资源成本。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has deployed a multi-account strategy on AWS by using AWS Control Tower. The company has provided individual AWS accounts to each of its developers. The company wants to implement controls to limit AWS resource costs that the developers incur. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 指示每个开发人员使用具有 CostCenter 键和开发人员名称值的标签来标记其所有资源。使用 required-tags AWS Config 托管规则来检查标签。创建 AWS Lambda 函数来终止没有标签的资源。配置 AWS Cost Explorer 以向每个开发人员发送每日报告以监控他们的支出。
A.en: Instruct each developer to tag all their resources with a tag that has a key of CostCenter and a value of the developer's name. Use the required-tags AWS Config managed rule to check for the tag. Create an AWS Lambda function to terminate resources that do not have the tag. Configure AWS Cost Explorer to send a daily report to each developer to monitor their spending.

B.zh: 使用 AWS 预算为每个开发人员账户建立预算。设置实际值和预测值的预算警报，以便在开发人员超出或预计超出分配的预算时通知他们。使用 AWS Budgets 操作将 DenyAll 策略应用到开发人员的 IAM 角色，以防止在达到分配的预算时启动额外资源。
B.en: Use AWS Budgets to establish budgets for each developer account. Set up budget alerts for actual and forecast values to notify developers when they exceed or expect to exceed their assigned budget. Use AWS Budgets actions to apply a DenyAll policy to the developer's IAM role to prevent additional resources from being launched when the assigned budget is reached.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Cost Explorer 监控和报告每个开发人员账户的成本。配置 Cost Explorer 以向每个开发人员发送每日报告以监控他们的支出。使用 AWS 成本异常检测来检测异常支出并提供警报。
C.en: Use AWS Cost Explorer to monitor and report on costs for each developer account. Configure Cost Explorer to send a daily report to each developer to monitor their spending. Use AWS Cost Anomaly Detection to detect anomalous spending and provide alerts.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Service Catalog 允许开发人员在有限的成本范围内启动资源。在每个 AWS 账户中创建 AWS Lambda 函数，以便在每个工作日结束时停止运行资源。配置 Lambda 函数以在每个工作日开始时恢复资源。
D.en: Use AWS Service Catalog to allow developers to launch resources within a limited cost range. Create AWS Lambda functions in each AWS account to stop running resources at the end of each work day. Configure the Lambda functions to resume the resources at the start of each work day.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：这种方式依赖开发人员的主动性，需要额外的开发和维护工作，运维开销较高。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This method relies on the initiative of developers, requires additional development and maintenance work, and has high operation and maintenance overhead.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用 AWS Budgets：正确： AWS Budgets 是一款专为成本管理而设计的工具，允许您设置预测、警报和自动执行操作（例如应用 DenyAll 策略）。优点：运行开销低，自动化程度高，可以直接限制开发者超出默认的行为。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Using AWS Budgets: Correct: AWS Budgets is a tool designed for cost management that allows you to set forecasts, alerts, and automate actions (such as applying the DenyAll policy). Advantages: low operating overhead, high degree of automation, and can directly restrict developers from exceeding preset behaviors.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：无法直接限制开发者的资源使用，无法满足问题的需求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: It is impossible to directly limit the developer's resource usage and cannot meet the needs of the problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：运营开销很高，无法满足约束成本。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Operational overhead is high and constraint costs cannot be met.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS 预算为每个开发人员账户建立预算。设置实际值和预测值的预算警报，以便在开发人员超出或预计超出分配的预算时通知他们。使用 AWS Budgets 操作将 DenyAll 策略应用到开发人员的 IAM 角色，以防止在达到分配的预算时启动额外资源。
answer_text.en: B. Use AWS Budgets to establish budgets for each developer account. Set up budget alerts for actual and forecast values to notify developers when they exceed or expect to exceed their assigned budget. Use AWS Budgets actions to apply a DenyAll policy to the developer's IAM role to prevent additional resources from being launched when the assigned budget is reached.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (72%) C (28%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：使用 AWS Budgets：正确： AWS Budgets 是一款专为成本管理而设计的工具，允许您设置预测、警报和自动执行操作（例如应用 DenyAll 策略）。优点：运行开销低，自动化程度高，可以直接限制开发者超出默认的行为。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (72%) C (28%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Using AWS Budgets: Correct: AWS Budgets is a tool designed for cost management that allows you to set forecasts, alerts, and automate actions (such as applying the DenyAll policy). Advantages: low operating overhead, high degree of automation, and can directly restrict developers from exceeding preset behaviors.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师正在设计一个三层 Web 应用程序。该架构由面向互联网的应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 和托管在私有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例上的 Web 层组成。具有业务逻辑的应用程序层在私有子网中的 EC2 实例上运行。数据库层由在私有子网中的 EC2 实例上运行的 Microsoft SQL Server 组成。安全是公司的重中之重。解决方案架构师应使用哪种安全组配置组合？ （选择三项。）
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing a three-tier web application. The architecture consists of an internet-facing Application Load Balancer (ALB) and a web tier that is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets. The application tier with the business logic runs on EC2 instances in private subnets. The database tier consists of Microsoft SQL Server that runs on EC2 instances in private subnets. Security is a high priority for the company. Which combination of security group configurations should the solutions architect use? (Choose three.)

A.zh: 配置 Web 层的安全组以允许来自 ALB 安全组的入站 HTTPS 流量。
A.en: Configure the security group for the web tier to allow inbound HTTPS traffic from the security group for the ALB.

B.zh: 配置 Web 层的安全组以允许出站 HTTPS 流量到 0.0.0.0/0。
B.en: Configure the security group for the web tier to allow outbound HTTPS traffic to 0.0.0.0/0.

C.zh: 配置数据库层的安全组以允许来自应用程序层的安全组的入站 Microsoft SQL Server 流量。
C.en: Configure the security group for the database tier to allow inbound Microsoft SQL Server traffic from the security group for the application tier.

D.zh: 配置数据库层的安全组以允许出站 HTTPS 流量和 Microsoft SQL Server 流量到达 Web 层的安全组。
D.en: Configure the security group for the database tier to allow outbound HTTPS traffic and Microsoft SQL Server traffic to the security group for the web tier.

E.zh: 配置应用程序层的安全组以允许来自 Web 层安全组的入站 HTTPS 流量。
E.en: Configure the security group for the application tier to allow inbound HTTPS traffic from the security group for the web tier.

F.zh: 配置应用程序层的安全组以允许出站 HTTPS 流量和 Microsoft SQL Server 流量到达 Web 层的安全组。
F.en: Configure the security group for the application tier to allow outbound HTTPS traffic and Microsoft SQL Server traffic to the security group for the web tier.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 Web 层需要接收来自 ALB 的 HTTPS 流量，并且安全组规则应允许来自 ALB 安全组的入站流量。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. The web layer needs to receive HTTPS traffic from the ALB and the security group rules should allow inbound traffic from the ALB security group.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 Web 层通常不需要将 HTTPS 流量发送到所有地址 (0.0.0.0/0)。该规则不符合最小特权原则。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. The web tier typically does not need to send HTTPS traffic to all addresses (0.0.0.0/0). This rule does not comply with the principle of least privilege.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。数据库层需要接收来自应用层的SQL Server流量，安全组规则应该允许来自应用层安全组的入站流量。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. The database layer needs to receive SQL Server traffic from the application layer, and security group rules should allow inbound traffic from the application layer security group.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。数据库层不需要向Web层发送流量。确切地说是 HTTPS 流量和 SQL Server 流量。这不符合三层架构的通信逻辑。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. The database layer does not need to send traffic to the web layer. Exactly HTTPS traffic and SQL Server traffic. This does not comply with the communication logic of the three-tier architecture.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确的。用户层需要接收来自Web层的HTTPS流量，并且安全组规则应允许来自Web层安全组的入站流量。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. The user tier needs to receive HTTPS traffic from the web tier, and the security group rules should allow inbound traffic from the web tier security group.

F.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。用户层不需要向Web层发送HTTPS流量和SQL Server流量，这不符合三层架构的通信逻辑。
F.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. The user layer does not need to send HTTPS traffic and SQL Server traffic to the Web layer, which does not comply with the communication logic of the three-tier architecture.

answer_text.zh: A. 配置 Web 层的安全组以允许来自 ALB 安全组的入站 HTTPS 流量。；C. 配置数据库层的安全组以允许来自应用程序层的安全组的入站 Microsoft SQL Server 流量。；E. 配置应用程序层的安全组以允许来自 Web 层安全组的入站 HTTPS 流量。
answer_text.en: A. Configure the security group for the web tier to allow inbound HTTPS traffic from the security group for the ALB.; C. Configure the security group for the database tier to allow inbound Microsoft SQL Server traffic from the security group for the application tier.; E. Configure the security group for the application tier to allow inbound HTTPS traffic from the security group for the web tier.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： ACE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：正确。 Web 层需要接收来自 ALB 的 HTTPS 流量，并且安全组规则应允许来自 ALB 安全组的入站流量。；正确。数据库层需要接收来自应用层的SQL Server流量，安全组规则应该允许来自应用层安全组的入站流量。；正确的。用户层需要接收来自Web层的HTTPS流量，并且安全组规则应允许来自Web层安全组的入站流量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: ACE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Correct. The web layer needs to receive HTTPS traffic from the ALB and the security group rules should allow inbound traffic from the ALB security group.; Correct. The database layer needs to receive SQL Server traffic from the application layer, and security group rules should allow inbound traffic from the application layer security group.; Correct. The user tier needs to receive HTTPS traffic from the web tier, and the security group rules should allow inbound traffic from the web tier security group.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司发布了其生产应用程序的新版本。该公司的工作负载使用 Amazon EC2、AWS Lambda、AWS Fargate 和 Amazon SageMaker。由于使用量处于稳定状态，该公司希望对工作负载进行成本优化。该公司希望以最少的储蓄计划涵盖最多的服务。哪种储蓄计划组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company has released a new version of its production application. The company's workload uses Amazon EC2, AWS Lambda, AWS Fargate, and Amazon SageMaker. The company wants to cost optimize the workload now that usage is at a steady state. The company wants to cover the most services with the fewest savings plans. Which combination of savings plans will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 购买适用于 Amazon EC2 和 SageMaker 的 EC2 实例节省计划。
A.en: Purchase an EC2 Instance Savings Plan for Amazon EC2 and SageMaker.

B.zh: 购买适用于 Amazon EC2、Lambda 和 SageMaker 的计算节省计划。
B.en: Purchase a Compute Savings Plan for Amazon EC2, Lambda, and SageMaker.

C.zh: 购买 SageMaker 储蓄计划。
C.en: Purchase a SageMaker Savings Plan.

D.zh: 购买 Lambda、Fargate 和 Amazon EC2 的计算节省计划。
D.en: Purchase a Compute Savings Plan for Lambda, Fargate, and Amazon EC2.

E.zh: 购买适用于 Amazon EC2 和 Fargate 的 EC2 实例节省计划。
E.en: Purchase an EC2 Instance Savings Plan for Amazon EC2 and Fargate.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： EC2 实例节省计划仅适用于 Amazon EC2 实例，不涵盖 SageMaker。此选项不正确，因为它错误地将 SageMaker 包含在 EC2 实例节省计划中。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The EC2 Instance Savings Plan is only available for Amazon EC2 instances and does not cover SageMaker. This option is incorrect because it incorrectly includes SageMaker in the EC2 instance savings plan.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：计算节省计划可以涵盖 Amazon EC2 和 AWS Lambda，但不涵盖 SageMaker。此选项不正确，因为 SageMaker 无法被计算储蓄计划覆盖。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Compute Savings Plan can cover Amazon EC2 and AWS Lambda, but not SageMaker. This option is incorrect because SageMaker cannot be overridden by Calculate Savings Plan.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： SageMaker Savings Plan 旨在优化 Amazon SageMaker 成本。此选项是正确的，因为它为 SageMaker 服务提供专门的成本优化。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: SageMaker Savings Plan is designed to optimize Amazon SageMaker costs. This option is correct because it provides specialized cost optimization for SageMaker services.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：计算节省计划可以涵盖 Amazon EC2、AWS Lambda 和 AWS Fargate。此选项是正确的，因为它涵盖了大多数服务并提供了成本优化。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Compute savings plans can cover Amazon EC2, AWS Lambda, and AWS Fargate. This option is correct as it covers most services and provides cost optimization.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： EC2 实例节省计划仅适用于 Amazon EC2 实例，不涵盖 Fargate。此选项不正确，因为它错误地将 Fargate 包含在 EC2 实例节省计划中。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The EC2 Instance Savings Plan is only available for Amazon EC2 instances and does not cover Fargate. This option is incorrect because it incorrectly includes Fargate in the EC2 instance savings program.

answer_text.zh: C. 购买 SageMaker 储蓄计划。；D. 购买 Lambda、Fargate 和 Amazon EC2 的计算节省计划。
answer_text.en: C. Purchase a SageMaker Savings Plan.; D. Purchase a Compute Savings Plan for Lambda, Fargate, and Amazon EC2.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： CD (92%) 8%。热门讨论与考点摘要： SageMaker Savings Plan 旨在优化 Amazon SageMaker 成本。此选项是正确的，因为它为 SageMaker 服务提供专门的成本优化。；计算节省计划可以涵盖 Amazon EC2、AWS Lambda 和 AWS Fargate。此选项是正确的，因为它涵盖了大多数服务并提供了成本优化。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CD (92%) 8%. Popular discussion and key point summary: SageMaker Savings Plan is designed to optimize Amazon SageMaker costs. This option is correct because it provides specialized cost optimization for SageMaker services.; Compute savings plans can cover Amazon EC2, AWS Lambda, and AWS Fargate. This option is correct as it covers most services and provides cost optimization.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Microsoft SQL Server 数据库。公司的应用程序连接到数据库。该公司希望在对应用代码进行最少更改的情况下迁移到 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 数据库。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company uses a Microsoft SQL Server database. The company's applications are connected to the database. The company wants to migrate to an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL database with minimal changes to the application code. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 重写应用程序中的 SQL 查询。
A.en: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to rewrite the SQL queries in the applications.

B.zh: 在 Aurora PostgreSQL 上启用 Babelfish 以从应用程序运行 SQL 查询。
B.en: Enable Babelfish on Aurora PostgreSQL to run the SQL queries from the applications.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 和 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 迁移数据库架构和数据。
C.en: Migrate the database schema and data by using the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) and AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS).

D.zh: 使用 Amazon RDS 代理将应用程序连接到 Aurora PostgreSQL。
D.en: Use Amazon RDS Proxy to connect the applications to Aurora PostgreSQL.

E.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 重写应用程序中的 SQL 查询。
E.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to rewrite the SQL queries in the applications.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS SCT的主要功能是帮助迁移数据库架构和数据，而不是直接重写应用程序中的SQL查询。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The main function of AWS SCT is to help migrate the database schema and data, rather than directly rewriting the SQL queries in the application.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： Babelfish 允许 Aurora PostgreSQL 支持 Microsoft SQL Server 的 T-SQL 语法，从而减少应用代码修改。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Babelfish allows Aurora PostgreSQL to support Microsoft SQL Server's T-SQL syntax, reducing application code modifications.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS SCT 和 AWS DMS 是用于迁移数据库架构和数据的标准工具，可以帮助从 SQL Server 迁移到 Aurora PostgreSQL。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS SCT and AWS DMS are standard tools for migrating database schemas and data, and can help with migration from SQL Server to Aurora PostgreSQL.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon RDS 代理主要用于管理数据库连接池、优化性能和安全性，但与将 SQL Server 迁移到 Aurora PostgreSQL 无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon RDS Proxy is primarily used to manage database connection pools, optimize performance, and security, but is not relevant for migrating SQL Server to Aurora PostgreSQL.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS DMS 的功能是迁移数据，而不是在应用程序中重写 SQL 查询。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The function of AWS DMS is to migrate data, not to rewrite SQL queries in the application.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 Aurora PostgreSQL 上启用 Babelfish 以从应用程序运行 SQL 查询。；C. 使用 AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 和 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 迁移数据库架构和数据。
answer_text.en: B. Enable Babelfish on Aurora PostgreSQL to run the SQL queries from the applications.; C. Migrate the database schema and data by using the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) and AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS).

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： BC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Babelfish 允许 Aurora PostgreSQL 支持 Microsoft SQL Server 的 T-SQL 语法，从而减少应用代码修改。； AWS SCT 和 AWS DMS 是用于迁移数据库架构和数据的标准工具，可以帮助从 SQL Server 迁移到 Aurora PostgreSQL。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Babelfish allows Aurora PostgreSQL to support Microsoft SQL Server's T-SQL syntax, reducing application code modifications.; AWS SCT and AWS DMS are standard tools for migrating database schemas and data, and can help with migration from SQL Server to Aurora PostgreSQL.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司计划将应用程序重新托管到使用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 作为附加存储的 Amazon EC2 实例。解决方案架构师必须设计一个解决方案，以确保所有新创建的 Amazon EBS 卷默认加密。该解决方案还必须防止创建未加密的 EBS 卷。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company plans to rehost an application to Amazon EC2 instances that use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) as the attached storage. A solutions architect must design a solution to ensure that all newly created Amazon EBS volumes are encrypted by default. The solution must also prevent the creation of unencrypted EBS volumes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 配置 EC2 账户属性以始终加密新的 EBS 卷。
A.en: Configure the EC2 account attributes to always encrypt new EBS volumes.

B.zh: 使用 AWS 配置。配置加密卷标识符。应用默认 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 密钥。
B.en: Use AWS Config. Configure the encrypted-volumes identifier. Apply the default AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key.

C.zh: 配置 AWS Systems Manager 以创建 EBS 卷的加密副本。重新配置 EC2 实例以使用加密卷。
C.en: Configure AWS Systems Manager to create encrypted copies of the EBS volumes. Reconfigure the EC2 instances to use the encrypted volumes.

D.zh: 在 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 中创建客户托管密钥。配置 AWS Migration Hub 以在公司迁移工作负载时使用密钥。
D.en: Create a customer managed key in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Configure AWS Migration Hub to use the key when the company migrates workloads.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS 允许您配置 EC2 账户属性，以确保默认情况下对所有新创建的 EBS 卷进行加密。这是最直接的解决方案，也符合问题的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS allows you to configure EC2 account properties to ensure that all newly created EBS volumes are encrypted by default. This is the most straightforward solution and also fits the requirements of the problem.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 AWS Config 可用于监控资源合规性，但它无法直接阻止创建未加密的 EBS 卷。它只能在事后检测未加密的卷。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While AWS Config can be used to monitor resource compliance, it cannot directly prevent the creation of unencrypted EBS volumes. It can only detect unencrypted volumes after the fact.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项涉及额外步骤（创建加密副本并重新配置实例），并且不满足问题“确保新创建的 EBS 卷默认加密”的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option involves additional steps (creating an encrypted copy and reconfiguring the instance) and does not meet the requirements of the question "Ensure newly created EBS volumes are encrypted by default".

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Migration Hub 用于迁移工作负载，与确保 EBS 卷默认加密无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Migration Hub is used to migrate workloads and has nothing to do with ensuring that EBS volumes are encrypted by default.

answer_text.zh: A. 配置 EC2 账户属性以始终加密新的 EBS 卷。
answer_text.en: A. Configure the EC2 account attributes to always encrypt new EBS volumes.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (61%) B (39%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS 允许您配置 EC2 账户属性，以确保默认情况下对所有新创建的 EBS 卷进行加密。这是最直接的解决方案，也符合问题的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (61%) B (39%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS allows you to configure EC2 account properties to ensure that all newly created EBS volumes are encrypted by default. This is the most straightforward solution and also fits the requirements of the problem.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家电子商务公司希望从公司网站收集用户点击流数据以进行实时分析。该网站全天的流量模式都在波动。该公司需要一个可扩展的解决方案来适应不同的流量水平。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company wants to collect user clickstream data from the company's website for real-time analysis. The website experiences fluctuating traffic patterns throughout the day. The company needs a scalable solution that can adapt to varying levels of traffic. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在按需模式下使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 中的数据流来捕获点击流数据。使用AWS Lambda实时处理数据。
A.en: Use a data stream in Amazon Kinesis Data Streams in on-demand mode to capture the clickstream data. Use AWS Lambda to process the data in real time.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 捕获点击流数据。使用 AWS Glue 实时处理数据。
B.en: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to capture the clickstream data. Use AWS Glue to process the data in real time.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Kinesis Video Streams 捕获点击流数据。使用 AWS Glue 实时处理数据。
C.en: Use Amazon Kinesis Video Streams to capture the clickstream data. Use AWS Glue to process the data in real time.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink（以前称为 Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics）捕获点击流数据。使用AWS Lambda实时处理数据。
D.en: Use Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink (previously known as Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics) to capture the clickstream data. Use AWS Lambda to process the data in real time.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 的按需模型会自动扩展以适应流量波动，使其成为捕获点击流数据的理想选择。正确： AWS Lambda 可以无服务器处理数据流，从而实现实时分析。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams' on-demand model automatically scales to accommodate traffic fluctuations, making it ideal for capturing clickstream data. Correct: AWS Lambda can process data streams serverlessly, enabling real-time analytics.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 主要用于将数据传输到存储服务（例如 S3、Redshift），而不是实时处理数据。错误： AWS Glue 是一种 ETL 服务，通常用于数据的批量处理而不是实时处理。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose is primarily used to transfer data to storage services (e.g., S3, Redshift) rather than to process data in real time. Wrong: AWS Glue is an ETL service that is typically used for batch processing of data rather than real-time processing.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Kinesis Video Streams 用于处理观看流数据，而不是点击流数据。错误： AWS Glue 不适合实时处理数据。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Kinesis Video Streams is used to process view stream data, not click stream data. Error: AWS Glue is not suitable for real-time processing of data.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink 用于实时分析数据，但它不是数据捕获服务。错误： AWS Lambda 通常用于处理数据流，并不直接与 Apache Flink 集成。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink is used to analyze data in real time, but it is not a data capture service. Error: AWS Lambda is typically used to process data streams and is not directly integrated with Apache Flink.

answer_text.zh: A. 在按需模式下使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 中的数据流来捕获点击流数据。使用AWS Lambda实时处理数据。
answer_text.en: A. Use a data stream in Amazon Kinesis Data Streams in on-demand mode to capture the clickstream data. Use AWS Lambda to process the data in real time.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (93%) 7%。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 的按需模型会自动扩展以适应流量波动，使其成为捕获点击流数据的理想选择。正确： AWS Lambda 可以无服务器处理数据流，从而实现实时分析。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (93%) 7%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams' on-demand model automatically scales to accommodate traffic fluctuations, making it ideal for capturing clickstream data. Correct: AWS Lambda can process data streams serverlessly, enabling real-time analytics.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家跨国公司在 AWS 上运行其工作负载。该公司的应用程序使用跨 AWS 区域的 Amazon S3 存储桶来存储和分析敏感数据。该公司每天在多个 S3 存储桶中存储数百万个对象。该公司希望识别所有未启用版本控制的 S3 存储桶。哪种解决方案可以识别所有此类存储桶？
question_text.en: A global company runs its workloads on AWS. The company's application uses Amazon S3 buckets across AWS Regions for sensitive data storage and analysis. The company stores millions of objects in multiple S3 buckets daily. The company wants to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled. Which solution will identify every such bucket?

A.zh: 设置一个 AWS CloudTrail 事件，该事件具有用于识别所有未跨区域启用版本控制的 S3 存储桶的规则。
A.en: Set up an AWS CloudTrail event that has a rule to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 Storage Lens 来识别所有未跨区域启用版本控制的 S3 存储桶。
B.en: Use Amazon S3 Storage Lens to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

C.zh: 启用适用于 S3 的 IAM 访问分析器以识别未跨区域启用版本控制的所有 S3 存储桶。
C.en: Enable IAM Access Analyzer for S3 to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

D.zh: 创建 S3 多区域访问点以识别所有未跨区域启用版本控制的 S3 存储桶。
D.en: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： CloudTrail主要用于记录API调用和用户活动，而不是直接分析S3存储桶的配置。虽然可以通过 CloudTrail 记录 S3 存储桶创建或修改事件，但没有直接方法来识别哪些存储桶未启用版本控制。该选项不符合要求，因此是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudTrail is primarily used to record API calls and user activity, rather than directly analyzing the configuration of S3 buckets. While it is possible to log S3 bucket creation or modification events through CloudTrail, there is no direct way to identify which buckets do not have versioning enabled. This option does not meet the requirements and is therefore incorrect.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： S3 Storage Lens 是一款旨在分析和监控 S3 存储桶的工具，提供有关存储桶配置的详细信息，包括版本控制状态。该选项直接满足题目要求，可以识别桶，无需跨区域版本控制。这个选项是正确的。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: S3 Storage Lens is a tool designed to analyze and monitor S3 buckets, providing detailed information about the bucket configuration, including versioning status. This option directly meets the question requirements and can identify buckets without cross-regional version control. This option is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： IAM访问分析器主要用于分析资源的访问权限，而不是分析桶的配置状态。该工具无法直接识别存储桶是否启用了版本控制。该选项不符合要求，因此是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The IAM access analyzer is mainly used to analyze the access permissions of resources rather than the configuration status of buckets. The tool cannot directly identify whether a bucket has versioning enabled. This option does not meet the requirements and is therefore incorrect.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3多区域接入点用于跨区域访问桶，但不提供桶配置分析功能。该选项不符合题目要求，因此是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 multi-region access points are used to access buckets across regions, but do not provide bucket configuration analysis functions. This option does not meet the question requirements and is therefore incorrect.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon S3 Storage Lens 来识别所有未跨区域启用版本控制的 S3 存储桶。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon S3 Storage Lens to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： S3 Storage Lens 是一款旨在分析和监控 S3 存储桶的工具，提供有关存储桶配置的详细信息，包括版本控制状态。该选项直接满足题目要求，可以识别桶，无需跨区域版本控制。这个选项是正确的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: S3 Storage Lens is a tool designed to analyze and monitor S3 buckets, providing detailed information about the bucket configuration, including versioning status. This option directly meets the question requirements and can identify buckets without cross-regional version control. This option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要针对生成许多无法重新创建的文件的应用程序优化其 Amazon S3 存储成本。每个文件大约 5 MB，存储在 Amazon S3 标准存储中。公司必须将这些文件保存4年，然后才能删除这些文件。这些文件必须可以立即访问。这些文件在对象创建的前 30 天内访问频繁，但在前 30 天之后很少访问。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to optimize its Amazon S3 storage costs for an application that generates many files that cannot be recreated. Each file is approximately 5 MB and is stored in Amazon S3 Standard storage. The company must store the files for 4 years before the files can be deleted. The files must be immediately accessible. The files are frequently accessed in the first 30 days of object creation, but they are rarely accessed after the first 30 days. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 创建 S3 生命周期策略，以在对象创建 30 天后将文件移至 S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval。对象创建 4 年后删除文件。
A.en: Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move the files to S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval 30 days after object creation. Delete the files 4 years after object creation.

B.zh: 创建 S3 生命周期策略，以在对象创建 30 天后将文件移至 S3 单区-IA (S3 One Zone-IA)。对象创建 4 年后删除文件。
B.en: Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move the files to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) 30 days after object creation. Delete the files 4 years after object creation.

C.zh: 创建 S3 生命周期策略，以在对象创建后 30 天将文件移至 S3 标准-IA (S3 标准-IA)。对象创建 4 年后删除文件。
C.en: Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move the files to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) 30 days after object creation. Delete the files 4 years after object creation.

D.zh: 创建 S3 生命周期策略，以在对象创建后 30 天将文件移至 S3 标准-IA (S3 标准-IA)。对象创建 4 年后，将文件移至 S3 Glacier 灵活检索。
D.en: Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move the files to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) 30 days after object creation. Move the files to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval 4 years after object creation.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析： S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval是专门针对需要低延迟访问的冷数据而设计的存储类。适用于不经常访问文件但仍需要立即访问的场景。 30 天后将文件移至此类别可以显著降低存储成本，同时满足文件必须立即访问的要求。成本优化： S3 Glacier 即时检索成本低于 S3 标准-IA (S3 标准-IA)，使其成为更具成本效益的选项。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval is a storage class designed specifically for cold data that requires low-latency access. Suitable for scenarios where files are accessed infrequently but still require immediate access. Moving files to this category after 30 days can significantly reduce storage costs while meeting the requirement that files must be accessible immediately. Cost Optimization: S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval costs less than S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA), making it a more cost-effective option.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3 One Zone-IA 仅将数据存储在一个可用区。由于这些文件无法重新创建，单可用区存储不满足所需的弹性和持久性。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 One Zone-IA stores data in only one Availability Zone. Because the files cannot be recreated, single-AZ storage does not provide the required resilience and durability.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3 Standard-IA 可以立即访问文件，但其长期存储成本高于 S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval，因此不是最具成本效益的选择。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 Standard-IA provides immediate access, but its long-term storage cost is higher than S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval, so it is not the most cost-effective choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：题目要求在对象创建 4 年后删除文件，而不是在此时转入 S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval；该生命周期策略不会按要求删除数据。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The files must be deleted 4 years after creation, not transitioned to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval at that time, so this lifecycle policy does not meet the deletion requirement.
